description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, accented by red-brown window shutters and trim, and the house features multiple symmetrically arranged windows on each side. The front facade includes a main entryway with a small porch and steps, flanked by decorative shrubbery and a paved walkway. The interior layout is visible, showing several rooms, hallways, and open living spaces, with clear partition walls and doorways. The landscaping includes green bushes and small garden beds along the perimeter, enhancing the curb appeal. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on symmetry and clean lines.
description: A single-story white house with red-brown shutters, flat roof, symmetrical windows, and landscaped garden beds along the exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows with red-brown shutters, and landscaped garden beds.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the entry porch, steps, and dense shrubbery along the walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a paved area, and additional garden beds.
description_view_3: Back view with fewer windows, a small garden bed, and a clear view of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with small porch, steps, and flanking shrubbery; simple door with minimal decorative elements.
